name: viem-tx-sim
description: RPC-only transaction simulation helpers for viem applications.

scripts.fmt: oxfmt package.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts src test scripts
scripts.fmt:check: oxfmt --check package.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts src test scripts
scripts.lint: oxlint && oxfmt --check package.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts src test scripts
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --fix && oxfmt package.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts src test scripts
